name: Explain repo
expected: OpenShard summarises the repo structure and records a read-only run receipt
safety_note: Read-only. No files are written. Safe to run on any public repo.

name: Production IaC hardening review
input: Review and harden this deliberately flawed Terraform codebase. Assess it through three lenses: security and compliance posture for a bank-facing product, operability for a 2am incident with no infrastructure specialist on call, and developer experience for a 5-10 person engineering team that is not infrastructure-specialist. Identify critical, high, and medium risks. Explain trade-offs. Propose safe hardening changes. Prioritise ruthlessly. Do not apply changes directly without review.
expected: OpenShard reviews the Terraform codebase, identifies prioritised infrastructure risks across security, operability, and developer experience, records a run receipt, and proposes changes reviewable with openshard last --more
safety_note: Use the HarbourDocs example in examples/production-infra-demo/ or a sanitised copy. No real project IDs, accounts, IPs, or secrets.

name: Terraform networking review
input: Review this Terraform networking configuration and identify risky firewall rules, overly broad ingress, missing egress controls, and subnet design issues before apply.
expected: OpenShard identifies open ingress rules, missing VPC service controls, and subnet risks, then records a run receipt
safety_note: Use sanitised Terraform with fake CIDRs and no real account IDs.

name: IAM policy security review
input: Review this IAM configuration and identify privilege escalation risks, overly broad roles, wildcard permissions, and missing least-privilege controls.
expected: OpenShard flags roles/editor usage, missing conditions, and overly broad service account bindings, then records a run receipt
safety_note: Use sanitised IAM resources with fake project IDs and no real service account emails.

name: Secrets hygiene review
input: Review how secrets are managed in this Terraform codebase and identify any hard-coded values, insecure references, or missing rotation controls.
expected: OpenShard identifies hard-coded secret values, insecure placeholder patterns, and missing lifecycle policies, then records a run receipt
safety_note: Use sanitised secrets.tf with placeholder values only. Never include real secrets in the demo.

name: Observability and alerting review
input: Review the monitoring and alerting configuration in this Terraform codebase and identify alert fatigue risks, missing uptime checks, and gaps in incident visibility.
expected: OpenShard identifies threshold-at-zero alert policies, missing notification channels, and absent uptime checks, then records a run receipt
safety_note: Read-only analysis. No real monitoring config or production data.

name: CI/CD pipeline safety review
input: Review this CI/CD pipeline configuration and identify unguarded production deploys, missing approval gates, exposed secrets in environment variables, and risky automation patterns.
expected: OpenShard identifies unsafe deploy patterns, missing manual approval steps, and secret exposure risks, then records a run receipt
safety_note: Use a sanitised pipeline file with fake org names and no real tokens or environment configs.

name: State management review
input: Review the Terraform state configuration in this codebase and identify risks from hard-coded backend settings, missing state locking, and insecure state access patterns.
expected: OpenShard identifies hard-coded bucket names, missing state locking, and insecure state access, then records a run receipt
safety_note: Read-only analysis. No real state files or backend credentials.

name: Inspect recent run
expected: Shows the most recent run receipt: task, model, cost, status, and check results
safety_note: Read-only command. Shows local run history only.

name: Preview latest diff
expected: Shows a unified diff of the files the last run proposed to change, before any apply
safety_note: Read-only. No changes made to disk.

name: Dry-run apply latest changes
expected: Previews which files would be written to disk without making any actual changes
safety_note: Dry run only. No files are written.
